sales.revenueGuideDesc: License, ads, and subscription distribution + earnings by video length
sales.payoutSchedule: Previous month's revenue is automatically paid out on the 15th of each month
sales.guideTip2: Fill in cinema metadata (director, cast, synopsis, etc.)
sales.guideTip3: Upload regularly to build viewer loyalty
sales.guideTip4: Share on social media to boost view count → more ad exposure
sales.warningCopyrightDesc: All uploaded videos must be your own creation or content you have legitimate rights to use. Unauthorized use of third-party works may result in video removal, account suspension, and legal liability.
sales.warningAiDesc: AI-generated videos must clearly state the AI tool (ai_tool), model version (ai_model_version), seed, etc. Exposure may be restricted if not disclosed.
sales.warningProhibitedDesc: Pornographic content, violent/cruel depictions, discriminatory/hate speech, content inappropriate for minors, and content defaming real people will be immediately removed.
sales.warningPayoutAccuracyDesc: Accurate account information in your name is required. Registering accounts in others' names may result in payout suspension and clawback.
sales.warningStagedDesc: 1st warning → 2nd video privatization + payout hold → 3rd account suspension + payout clawback (may be immediate based on severity)

upload.revenueGuideDesc: Find out what revenue you can earn by video length in just 1 minute
upload.policyDescription: CREAITE is a platform dedicated to AI cinematic films. We do not accept short-form content under 30 seconds (like YouTube Shorts or TikTok). Only videos of 1 minute or longer appear in the Cinema/OTT sections and earn license, ad, and subscription revenue.
upload.tooShort: Video too short. Minimum {{sec}} seconds required (current: {{current}}s). CREAITE is dedicated to AI cinematic films.

upload.highlightDescription: Choose your most striking moment to boost click-through.

heroClip.title: OTT Hero Preview Clip
heroClip.description: This is a 10+ minute OTT video. If it's later featured in the OTT hero section, registering a ~30s highlight clip here ensures sharp playback. Without it, the full video plays — and if the highlight point is deep, quality may drop. (MP4, 50MB or less)
heroClip.mp4Only: Only MP4 files can be uploaded.
heroClip.tooLarge: Hero clip must be 50MB or less.

upload.uploadPolicyNotice: ⚠️ Upload Policy — All videos are automatically scanned by Google Vision. Violations result in immediate removal, account suspension, and potential legal action: (1) Sexually explicit/adult content (2) Unauthorized celebrity use/deepfakes (3) Violence/hate/discrimination (4) Copyright/portrait rights infringement. By uploading, you accept full responsibility.
upload.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Cosmic Journey through Space — 4K Cinematic
upload.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the video's features, mood, possible uses, AI tools/techniques used, etc. A well-written description helps with search and recommendations.
upload.aiProofDescription: AI production evidence becomes strong protection in copyright disputes and inspires other creators.
upload.seedDescription: The unique number given by the AI tool. Used to regenerate the same video and serves as strong evidence in copyright disputes.
upload.cinemaMetaDescription: Record the work's information like movie credits. Movie-style details will appear on the work page.
upload.subtitleUploadFailed: Subtitle upload failed. You can retry from Edit Video.
upload.subtitleSoftHint: To let viewers toggle subtitles on/off, upload a separate .vtt file instead of burning subtitles into the video. Burned-in subtitles can't be turned off.
upload.tagsHint: Add with Enter or comma. Backspace on empty to delete last tag.
upload.visibilityDescription: Decide who can see the video.
upload.visibilityPublicDesc: Shown on search, home feed, and cinema tab
upload.visibilityUnlistedDesc: Visible only to those with the link (not searchable)
upload.visibilityPrivateDesc: Visible only to you and approved buyers
upload.highlightOrderInvalid: Highlight end must be greater than start
upload.priceDescription: A license covering YouTube, social media, corporate marketing, and all commercial/non-commercial uses. Perpetual use after purchase.
upload.shortVideoExplain: Home feed shorts earn ad revenue only. For license sales, upload videos longer than 3 minutes.
upload.freeVideoNotice: 💡 Setting the price to ₩0 means free viewing only — no license sales. Downloads are disabled, but ad revenue and subscriber view revenue are still settled normally.
upload.copyrightPledge: I confirm that this video does not infringe on any third-party copyrights and was created using plans that allow commercial use. I agree that any false statements are my full legal responsibility.

cinema.title: Unlimited AI cinema
cinema.desc: Watch AI-made films, dramas, animation, and documentaries — all in one place, unlimited.

adFree.title: Ad-free viewing

license.title: All-in-one license
license.desc: Use purchased videos broadly — YouTube, social, corporate marketing. Copyright-verified with escrow protection.

devices.title: Watch on any device
devices.desc: Desktop, mobile, tablet — anywhere. Watch right in the browser, no app install.

posterWall.descLine2: Watch without limits; own the ones you love forever with a license.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? Find your answers here.

what.a: The world's first AI cinema OTT, gathering AI-made films, dramas, and documentaries. As you watch, you can also buy a creator's video license and use it as your own content.

price.a: ₩2,900/mo for unlimited viewing plus ad removal. Non-subscribers can still preview every video for 1 minute.

copyright.q: How does copyright work for AI videos?
copyright.a: At upload, creators warrant there's no copyright infringement. CREAITE auto-screens with Google Vision to block explicit/violent content and celebrity misuse, and takes immediate action on violations.

licensePurchase.a: Buying a paid video gets you the original file download plus broad commercial rights — YouTube, social, corporate marketing, and more. It's a perpetual license with no time limit.

creatorEarnings.a: Three revenue sources: license sales (80%), video ads (50–60% by length), and the OTT subscription pool share (50%). See the footer's "Creator Revenue Policy" for details.

refund.a: Subscriptions can be canceled anytime until the next billing date. Video licenses are downloadable digital goods, so refunds after purchase are restricted (withdrawal exception under the E-Commerce Act).

guest.q: Can I watch without signing in?
guest.a: Yes. Guests can preview every video for 1 minute. Watching past 1 minute, buying licenses, and commenting require sign-up.

faq.moreInfo: For more, see <aboutLink>About</aboutLink> or the <revenueLink>Creator Revenue Policy</revenueLink>.

cta.descLine2: Cancel anytime · watch right after sign-up.

creatorRevenueGuide.title: Creator Revenue Policy
creatorRevenueGuide.subtitle: A clear look at how you earn from AI videos on CREAITE, and which videos qualify for which revenue sources.

when.title: 📌 When do earnings happen?
when.body: All revenue (license, ads, subscription) is earned after a viewer clicks a video card and opens the detail page, then plays the video or buys a license. Cards simply appearing in the home feed, Cinema, or OTT don't earn anything on their own.
when.note: ※ The ad inserted every 4th video in the home feed is CREAITE's own ad and isn't shared with creators. Ads shared with creators are the ones shown when a video plays on its detail page.

sources.title: 3 revenue sources
sources.subtitle: CREAITE shares revenue with creators three ways: license sales, ads, and subscriptions.

license.title: License sales
license.desc: Set a price on your video and earn instantly on every purchase. Platform fee 20%.

ad.title: Ad revenue
ad.desc: Earn every time an ad on your video is shown. Share rate varies by video length.

sub.title: Subscription share
sub.desc: Shared monthly by watch-time on 10+ min OTT videos. 50% of all subscription revenue accrues to the creator pool.

tiers.title: Revenue potential by video length
tiers.subtitle: Where your video appears and what it can earn depends on its length.

shorts.title: Home feed shorts (under 3 min)
shorts.desc: Shown as short videos in the home feed. No license sales — ad revenue only.

cinema.title: Cinema (3 min+)
cinema.desc: Shown in the Cinema tab. Non-subscribers preview up to 1 min → viewers subscribe to watch to the end.

ott.title: OTT (10 min+)
ott.desc: Shown in the premium OTT tab. Subscribers only. The sole target of subscription-share revenue — watch time is income.
ott.tip: 💡 Longer is better: for the same video, a longer runtime accumulates more watch time → a higher subscription share and more ad opportunities (e.g. multiple mid-rolls).
ott.adNote: 📢 When ad revenue occurs: an OTT video's ad revenue (60%) is earned only while a non-subscriber is in the 1-minute preview. Subscribers watch ad-free, so their watch time is settled via the subscription share (50%).

ads.title: Types of video ads
ads.subtitle: Your video can carry these 5 ad formats; every impression shares revenue with the creator.
ads.preroll: Shown right before the video plays. The most common ad format.
ads.overlay: A small banner at the bottom during playback. Minimal disruption.
ads.midroll: Inserted mid-video, only on OTT videos 10+ minutes long.
ads.postroll: Shown when the video ends, before the next recommendation.
ads.bumper: A short 6-second ad. Barely interrupts the viewing flow.
ads.note: Ad rates are set per 1,000 impressions (CPM), and the share rate varies by where the video appears (Home, Cinema, OTT). Rates may change with market conditions and advertiser policy.

subscription.title: How the subscription share is calculated
subscription.subtitle: Shared monthly by your share of effective watch-time on OTT videos (10 min+).
subscription.formula1: My earnings = (my OTT effective watch-time / total OTT watch-time) × creator pool
subscription.exampleBody:
If your videos make up 5% of total OTT watch time
→ you receive 5% of that month's creator pool.
subscription.cautionBody:
Only effective views count:
watching 30% or more of the video + no duplicate from the same IP within 24 hours.

settlement.title: Payout policy
settlement.subtitle: Each month on the 1st we calculate and pay out the previous month's earnings.
settlement.cycleValue: On the 1st of each month (previous month's earnings totaled)
settlement.minimumValue: ₩10,000 — rolls over to next month if below
settlement.taxIndividualValue: 3.3% withheld automatically at payout (3% income + 0.3% local)
settlement.taxBusinessValue: Issue a separate tax invoice (business registration number required)
settlement.newVideoHoldValue: Ad revenue isn't counted for 48 hours after upload (anti-abuse)
settlement.methodValue: To your registered account within 1–2 business days (My Page → Settings)

maximize.title: 💡 To maximize your earnings
maximize.tip1: Regularly posting OTT videos of 10+ minutes lets you earn all three: license, ads, and subscription share.
maximize.tip2: A single video's completion rate (how far people watch) matters more than the number of videos.
maximize.tip3: Posting related videos consistently keeps viewers watching back-to-back within one channel → compounding watch time.
maximize.tip4: License prices are set freely per video. You can gradually raise prices on popular videos.

disclaimer.body: The share rates and policies in this guide may change as operations require, with advance notice before any change.
disclaimer.terms: For full details, see the <link>Terms of Service</link>.
